areas.title: Federated Learning Security
areas.description: Byzantine-resilient federated learning for secure cross-institution collaboration through cryptographic verification and robust aggregation protocols.
highlights: SignGuard: 94.5% attack detection with ECDSA + Anomaly Detection + Reputation
Secure aggregation with Shamir's Secret Sharing
Privacy attacks: membership inference, gradient leakage, property inference
achievements: FL Security Ecosystem: 3 focused repos (core, adversarial, privacy) from 31 implementations
SignGuard: Layered defense achieving 94.5% detection rate
Published research paper on FL security

areas.title: Banking Fraud Detection
areas.description: Production fraud detection systems for major Indonesian financial institutions with real-time ML models and explainability.
highlights: Real-time transaction monitoring with ML models
Feature engineering for velocity-based fraud patterns
LSTM autoencoders for sequential fraud detection
Model explainability with SHAP and LIME
achievements: Maintained 99.9%+ SLA compliance for production fraud detection systems
Improved monitoring efficiency by 50% through automation
Fraud ML Engine: multi-family model benchmarking with <50ms scoring

areas.title: Malware Analysis & Detection
areas.description: Static analysis framework for banking trojan detection through PE file analysis, API call extraction, and ML classification.

areas.title: Cryptography & Privacy
areas.description: Applied cryptographic methods for secure ML systems including signature schemes, pseudorandom generation, and privacy-preserving machine learning techniques.

areas.title: Production AI & ML Engineering
areas.description: Modular enterprise AI platform architecture spanning specialized agent orchestration, production infrastructure, and hybrid RAG systems.
highlights: Multi-modal RAG systems for document intelligence
LangGraph agents for customer support and fraud triage
LLMOps evaluation frameworks with RAGAS metrics
Production deployment with Docker and Kubernetes
achievements: Enterprise AI Platform: 3 focused modules (agents, infra, RAG)
4 agent types: support, fraud triage, ad insights, LLMOps
4 RAG modes: hybrid, multimodal, SQL, domain-specific

areas.title: Financial ML & Forecasting
areas.description: Time series forecasting and predictive modeling for financial markets and economic indicators using ensemble methods and deep learning.
achievements: IDX AI Trading System with signal generation and backtesting
LSTM/SVR ensemble forecasting for IDX stocks
